description: Provider-neutral network-wide and opt-in deep monitoring for Hashi, Bitcoin and operator gas. Derived from Trusted Point's Apache-2.0 dashboard and inspired by Sui validator fleet dashboards.

panels.title: All Committee Endpoint TLS Status
panels.description: Public endpoint reachability for every member discovered from the on-chain current committee. This does not expose private node metrics.

panels.title: Reported Version Distribution
panels.description: Versions reported by GetServiceInfo. Older Hashi builds return an empty response and appear in Unknown Version.

panels.title: Per-node Reported Version
panels.description: Every on-chain committee member. `unknown` means the endpoint does not yet populate GetServiceInfo.server.
Shows whether the node is a participating signer in the current MPC committee.
panels.title: In Committee

panels.description: Number of connected Bitcoin P2P peers. A value of 0 means no peers are connected.
panels.title: Kyoto ₿ Peers

panels.description: Percentage of Kyoto Bitcoin light client synchronization progress. 100% indicates the Kyoto light client is fully synced.
panels.title: Kyoto Sync

panels.description: Indicates whether the Kyoto Bitcoin light client is synced.
panels.title: Kyoto Synced

panels.description: Indicates whether Hashi is currently reconfiguring the MPC committee. If it remains False for more than 10 minutes, check DKG/rotation logs for errors.
panels.title: Reconfig Complete

panels.description: Hashi may leave this gauge at zero until a signing path updates it. Do not alert on this metric alone.
panels.title: Presignature Gauge (informational)

panels.description: Recovery activity is diagnostic. It is not an incident when threshold signing ultimately succeeds.
panels.title: MPC Signing Recovery Activity

panels.description: Indicates whether Guardian is enabled and reachable.
panels.title: Guardian Enabled | Online

panels.description: Indicates whether the local Guardian limiter has lost synchronization with the Guardian.
panels.title: Guardian  Limiter Synced

panels.description: Indicates whether Hashi is currently reconfiguring the MPC committee. If it remains active for more than 10 minutes, check DKG/rotation logs for errors.
panels.title: Reconfig Status History

panels.description: Recovery activity is diagnostic. It is not an incident when threshold signing ultimately succeeds.
panels.title: MPC Signing Recovery Activity

panels.description: This node’s effective weight in the current MPC committee after committee weights are compressed into MPC shares.
panels.title: MPC Reduced Weight
Suspicious MPC Recoveries
panels.description: Investigate trends; do not page unless signing remains failed or bridge progress stalls.
Indicates whether Guardian integration is enabled and reachable.
panels.title: Guardian Enabled | Online

panels.description: Indicates whether the local Guardian limiter has lost synchronization with the Guardian.
panels.title: Guardian  Limiter Synced

panels.description: Average number of Guardian bootstrap attempts. A sustained non-zero rate may indicate repeated bootstrap retries or difficulty retrieving Guardian information.
panels.title: Guardian Bootstrap Attempts Rate

panels.description: Current withdrawal capacity available in the local Guardian limiter bucket.
panels.title: Guardian Available Cap

panels.description: Shows whether the local Guardian limiter has been initialized from the Guardian state.
panels.title: Guardian Limiter Initialized

panels.description: Portion of the Guardian limiter’s maximum Bitcoin withdrawal capacity currently available.
panels.title: Guardian Cap Available

panels.description: Maximum withdrawal capacity of the local Guardian limiter bucket, as configured by the Guardian.
panels.title: Guardian Max Cap
Inbound RPC Request Rate by Method
Outbound RPC Request Rate by Method
Hashi Node [MPC Protocol Durations for $__range / 24h Fallback]

title: Hashi Community — Fleet & Node Detail
